title: A Fragile Defense
lines: You heave a heavy, rotting shelf across the base of the stairs. It shudders as the first of the grey-skinned villagers slams into it, their inhuman strength nearly toppling your defense.
The wood groans and splinters, and pale, elongated fingers reach through the gaps, grasping blindly at your ankles.
The barricade won't hold for long. You must move now!

options.desc: Scramble up the stairs while you still can
